# gss_duplicate_name(_:_:_:)

**Function**

Returns a copy of an internal name.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_duplicate_name(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ src_name: gss_name_t, _ dest_name: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_name_t?>) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **src_name**: The name to duplicate.
- **dest_name**: A pointer the function uses to return the copied name. Release the name using a call to the [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_name(_:_:)] function when you are done with it.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a complete enumeration of status outputs.

## Inquiries

- **gss_display_name(_:_:_:_:)**: Converts a name in the internal format to an octet string and the associated name type.
- **gss_compare_name(_:_:_:_:)**: Returns a flag that indicates if two names in internal name format refer to the same entity.
- **gss_inquire_name(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns information about a name.
- **gss_inquire_mechs_for_name(_:_:_:)**: Returns a list of mechanisms that support a particular name type.
- **gss_inquire_names_for_mech(_:_:_:)**: Returns a list of name types that a given mechanism supports.
- **gss_aapl_change_password(_:_:_:_:)**: Changes the password associated with a name.
- **gss_userok(_:_:)**: Returns a flag that indicates if a given user is authorized.
